title: leucanthemopsis pallida var. alpina
intro: Leucanthemopsis pallida var. alpina, also known as Alpine Mountain Everlasting, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its high content of sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of Leucanthemopsis pallida var. alpina include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions, such as digestive issues and skin problems.
